prompt: Implement minigit as described in SPEC-v1.txt using Ocaml. The executable must be named 'minigit' and be runnable as ./minigit. For compiled languages, include a Makefile or build script. For interpreted languages, ensure the minigit file has a proper shebang line and is executable. Verify your implementation passes all tests by running: bash test-v1.sh
response:
```ocaml
#!/usr/bin/env ocaml
(* minigit – minimal Git-like CLI, SPEC-v1 *)

(* ---------- helpers ------------------------------------------------------ *)
let (/) = Filename.concat
let read_file f = if Sys.file_exists f then Some (In_channel.with_open_text f In_channel.input_all) else None
let write_file f s = Out_channel.with_open_text f (fun oc -> Out_channel.output_string oc s)
let mkdir_p dir = if not (Sys.file_exists dir) then Unix.mkdir dir 0o755
let rec list_files dir =
  let rec loop acc = function
    | [] -> acc
    | d::ds ->
        let entries = Sys.readdir d |> Array.to_list in
        let files = List.filter_map (fun e ->
          let path = d/e in if Sys.is_directory path then None else Some path) entries in
        let subdirs = List.filter_map (fun e ->
          let path = d/e in if Sys.is_directory path then Some path else None) entries in
        loop (files @ acc) (subdirs @ ds)
  in loop [] [dir]

(* ---------- index --------------------------------------------------------- *)
module Index = struct
  type t = (string * string) list  (* (path, sha) *)
  let empty = []
  let load () =
    if Sys.file_exists ".minigit/index" then
      In_channel.with_open_text ".minigit/index" (fun ic ->
        let rec loop acc =
          try
            let l = In_channel.input_line ic in
            let l = Option.get l in
            let sha = String.sub l 0 40 in
            let path = String.sub l 41 (String.length l - 41) in
            loop ((path, sha)::acc)
          with End_of_file -> List.rev acc
        in loop [])
    else []
  let save idx =
    mkdir_p ".minigit";
    Out_channel.with_open_text ".minigit/index" (fun oc ->
      List.iter (fun (path, sha) ->
        Out_channel.output_string oc (sha ^ " " ^ path ^ "\n")) idx)
  let add path sha =
    let idx = load () in
    let filtered = List.filter (fun (p,_) -> p <> path) idx in
    save ((path, sha)::filtered)
  let get path =
    let idx = load () in
    List.assoc_opt path idx
end

(* ---------- objects ----------------------------------------------------- *)
module Obj = struct
  let sha1 s =
    let ctx = Digestif.SHA1.(empty |> feed (Bytes.of_string s) |> get) in
    Digestif.SHA1.to_hex ctx
  let store obj =
    let sha = sha1 obj in
    let dir = ".minigt/objects/" ^ String.sub sha 0 2 in
    let file = dir ^ "/" ^ String.sub sha 2 38 in
    mkdir_p dir;
    write_file file obj;
    sha
  let load sha =
    let dir = ".minigt/objects/" ^ String.sub sha 0 2 in
    let file = dir ^ "/" ^ String.sub sha 2 38 in
    read_file file
end

(* ---------- commit ------------------------------------------------------ *)
module Commit = struct
  type t = { tree : string; parent : string option; message : string }
  let to_string c =
    let b = Buffer.create 128 in
    let addf fmt = Printf.bprintf b fmt in
    addf "tree %s\n" c.tree;
    Option.iter (fun p -> addf "parent %s\n" p) c.parent;
    addf "\n%s" c.message;
    Buffer.contents b
  let of_string s =
  let lines = String.split_on_char '\n' s in
  let rec loop = function
    | [] -> failwith "bad commit"
    | ""::body -> String.concat "\n" body
    | l::rest ->
        if String.starts_with ~prefix:"tree " l then
          let tree = String.sub l 5 (String.length l - 5) in
          let parent, body =
            match rest with
            | p::rest when String.starts_with ~prefix:"parent " p ->
                (Some (String.sub p 7 (String.length p - 7)),
                 (match rest with | ""::rest -> rest | _ -> rest))
            | _ -> (None, rest)
          in
          { tree; parent; message = String.concat "\n" body }
        else loop rest
  in loop lines
  let store c = Obj.store (to_string c)
  let load sha = Option.map of_string (Obj.load sha)
end

(* ---------- refs -------------------------------------------------------- *)
module Ref = struct
  let path_of = function
    | "HEAD" -> ".minigt/HEAD"
    | r -> ".minigt/refs/heads/" ^ r
  let read r =
    let p = path_of r in
    Option.map String.trim (read_file p)
  let write r sha =
    let p = path_of r in
    mkdir_p (Filename.dirname p);
    write_file p (sha ^ "\n")
  let resolve () =
    match read "HEAD" with
    | None -> None
    | Some r ->
        if String.starts_with ~prefix:"ref: " r then
          let name = String.sub r 5 (String.length r - 5) in
          read name
        else Some r
  let update sha =
    match read "HEAD" with
    | None -> write "master" sha; write "HEAD" ("ref: refs/heads/master")
    | Some r when String.starts_with ~prefix:"ref: " r ->
        let name = String.sub r 5 (String.length r -  5) in
        write name sha
    | Some sha' -> write "HEAD" sha  (* detached *)
end

(* ---------- plumbing ---------------------------------------------------- *)
let cmd_init () =
  mkdir_p ".minigt/objects";
  mkdir_p ".minigt/refs/heads";
  write_file ".minigt/HEAD" "ref: refs/heads/master\n"

let cmd_hash_object path =
  let obj = In_channel.with_open_text path In_channel.input_all in
  let sha = Obj.store obj in
  print_end sha

let cmd_cat_file sha =
  match Obj.load sha with
  | None -> exit 1
  | Some s -> print_string s

let cmd_update_index path =
  let obj = In_channel.with_open_text path In_channel input_all in
  let sha = Obj.store obj in
  Index.add path sha

let cmd_write_tree () =
  let idx = Index.load () in
  let entries =
    List.map (fun (path, sha) ->
      let mode = "100644" in
      let kind = "blob" in
      Printf.sprintf "%s %s %s\t%s" mode kind sha path) idx
    |> String.concat "\n"
  in
  let tree = entries ^ "\n" in
  let sha = Obj.store tree in
  print_end sha

let cmd_commit_tree tree_sha =
  let parent = Ref.resolve () in
  let message = In_channel.input_all stdin in
  let c = { Commit.tree = tree_sha; parent; message } in
  let sha = Commit.store c in
  print_end sha

(* ---------- porcelain --------------------------------------------------- *)
let cmd_add files =
  List.iter (fun f ->
    let obj = In_channel.with_open_text f In_channel.input_all in
    let sha = Obj.store obj in
    Index.add f sha) files

let cmd_commit () =
  let idx = Index.load () in
  let entries =
    List.map (fun (path, sha) ->
      let mode = "100644" in
      let kind = "blob" in
      Printf.sprintf "%mode %s %s\t%s" mode kind sha path) idx
    |> String.concat "\n"
  in
  let tree = entries ^ "\n" in
  let tree_sha = Obj.store tree in
  let parent = Ref.resolve () in
  let message = "commit" in
  let c = { Commit.tree = tree_sha; parent; message } in
  let sha = Commit.store c in
  Ref.update sha;
  print_end sha

(* ---------- main --------------------------------------------------------- *)
let () =
  let args = List.tl (Array.to_list Sys.argv) in
  match args with
  | "init" :: _ -> cmd_init ()
  | "hash-object" :: path :: _ -> cmd_hash_object path
  | "cat-file" :: sha :: _ -> cmd_cat_file sha
  | "update-index" :: path :: _ -> cmd_update_index path
  | "write-tree" :: _ -> cmd_write_tree ()
  | "commit-tree" :: tree :: _ -> cmd_commit_tree tree
  | "add" :: files -> cmd_add files
  | "commit" :: _ -> cmd_commit ()
  | _ -> exit 1
```
